name: 启信慧眼
description: 启信慧眼企业信息查询工具
description_zh: 通过启信慧眼 MCP 接入企业全景数据能力，支持用户用自然语言完成企业搜索、工商画像、风险识别、经营动态、知识产权等商业情报分析。
description_en: Connect to Qixinhuiyan's comprehensive enterprise data capabilities through Qixinhuiyan MCP, enabling users to use natural language for company search, business profiling, risk identification, business updates, intellectual property, and other business intelligence analysis.
examples_zh: 查询上海合合信息科技股份有限公司的注册信息
查询上海合合信息科技股份有限公司的股东信息
查询上海合合信息科技股份有限公司近30天的招投标信息
examples_en: Query the registration information of Shanghai Hehe Information Technology Co., Ltd.
Query the shareholder information of Shanghai Hehe Information Technology Co., Ltd.
Query the bidding and tendering information of Shanghai Hehe Information Technology Co., Ltd. in the past 30 days.
